name: Beef, Cauliflower, and Snow Peas
recipeIngredient: 1/2 medium cauliflower head, broken into florets
1 lb very thin sliced flank steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the flank steak into 2-inch strips and mix cornstarch with soy sauce in a separate bowl.
2. Heat the chicken stock separately.
3. Heat oil in a heavy skillet or wok until very hot.
4. Add garlic to the hot oil and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Add the steak strips to the pan and sauté quickly, keeping it moving, just until it loses color (about 30 seconds).
6. Add onion, salt, and pepper; stir constantly for another half minute or so.
7. Pour in chicken broth and bring to a boil. Add cauliflower pieces in batches, cooking for about 3 minutes total.
8. Add snow peas and continue stirring until the peas are bright green (about 2-3 more minutes).
9. If the vegetables have reached their maximum tenderness (no longer than 7 minutes), remove from heat.
10. Stir in the soy sauce mixture and mix thoroughly. Continue to stir until the sauce thickens.
11. Serve immediately, transferring to a heavy serving dish.
